name: Birdies & Lattes
address: 1781 Lincoln Hwy 201, Second Floor, Edison, NJ 08817
about: Birdies & Lattes is an indoor golf and cafe venue in Edison, New Jersey, featuring state-of-the-art K-Golf simulators and PuttView green-reading technology. The facility offers a dual-purpose environment combining premium golf simulation with a cafe culture, providing year-round access for players of all skill levels. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals, with options for group packages, memberships, and private events to accommodate various needs and preferences.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium K-Golf simulators with PuttView technology for precise training
Indoor facility allows for year-round play regardless of weather
Combines golf with a cafe offering food and beverages for a complete social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Korean-inspired bar food, fresh sandwiches, pastries, and light bites available
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is welcome in the facility

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art K-Golf simulators with high-accuracy technology
Advanced green-reading system for putting practice

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: House clubs are included with bay rental, but you are welcome to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: BYOB is welcome, and you can also bring your own food. The venue also offers a cafe with Korean-inspired bar food, fresh sandwiches, pastries, and light bites.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on the number of players and pace, but a typical round on a simulator can take 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically market itself as kid-friendly, but the general atmosphere and activities may be suitable for families. Specific details about children's amenities or programs are not provided.
